title: Crowd Movement Near Checkpoint
situation: Local civilians gather unexpectedly near a checkpoint after hostile rumors spread online.
decision_required: Reinforce checkpoint discipline, protect civilians, and maintain movement.
white_cell_notes: Branches into protest, proxy action, or humanitarian friction.

title: Bridge Damage on Supply Route
situation: A bridge on a sustainment route shows signs of deliberate minor damage.
decision_required: Reroute convoys or secure and repair under guard.
white_cell_notes: Can cascade into theatre logistics delay.

title: Unidentified Armed Group Sighting
situation: A patrol reports armed personnel in mixed uniforms near a border community.
decision_required: Clarify identity, avoid escalation, and preserve freedom of movement.
white_cell_notes: Can branch into proxy activity or cross-border incident.

title: IFF Failure on Friendly Track
situation: A friendly aircraft fails IFF challenge while hostile activity is reported nearby.
decision_required: Confirm identification, prevent fratricide, and maintain air picture discipline.
white_cell_notes: Trigger command friction if units bypass reporting chain.

title: Radar Coverage Gap
situation: A short-duration radar blind spot appears along a key approach corridor.
decision_required: Decide whether to scramble fighters, reposition sensors, or accept risk.
white_cell_notes: Use for follow-on airspace intrusion inject.

title: Civil Aircraft Distress Near AO
situation: A civilian flight reports navigation anomalies near military airspace.
decision_required: Balance force protection with civil aviation safety responsibilities.
white_cell_notes: Can trigger media pressure and accusations of interference.

title: AIS Spoofing in Chokepoint
situation: Multiple merchant tracks display conflicting AIS identifiers near a contested strait.
decision_required: Re-task ISR, adjust traffic control, and determine escalation threshold.
white_cell_notes: Use as precursor to logistics delay and shadow-fleet narrative pressure.

title: Suspicious Survey Vessel
situation: A civilian-flagged vessel lingers close to undersea infrastructure routes.
decision_required: Decide monitoring posture and whether to board, shadow, or warn off.
white_cell_notes: Can develop into sabotage suspicion on next turn.

title: Port Access Disruption
situation: Pilot services and tug scheduling become irregular at a military-relevant port.
decision_required: Prioritise vessel movements and coordinate with host-nation authorities.
white_cell_notes: Follow with fuel and sustainment delays.

title: Joint Logistics Platform Latency Spike
situation: Logistics scheduling tools slow dramatically during force movement planning.
decision_required: Prioritise continuity measures and determine cyber defense response.
white_cell_notes: Follow with fuel and maintenance disruptions if unresolved.

title: Credential Leak on Contractor Portal
situation: Usernames and hashed passwords associated with a maintenance contractor appear online.
decision_required: Restrict access, rotate credentials, and assess operational impact.
white_cell_notes: Can unlock later supply-chain compromise.

title: Malware Beaconing on Ops Network
situation: Endpoint telemetry shows encrypted outbound connections from an operations support segment.
decision_required: Isolate hosts or continue operations while investigating.
white_cell_notes: Escalates to data integrity loss on next turn.

title: ISR Coverage Degradation
situation: Several ISR products arrive late or with reduced confidence during coalition crisis decisions.
decision_required: Re-prioritise tasking and decide which commander gets limited collection.
white_cell_notes: Follow with uncertainty in target validation and public confidence.

title: Satellite Telemetry Drift
situation: A communications satellite reports minor attitude-control deviations.
decision_required: Choose whether to reconfigure users, reduce throughput, or monitor only.
white_cell_notes: Can develop into wider SATCOM instability.

title: Ground Station Interference
situation: Intermittent uplink interference affects a regional ground station.
decision_required: Reroute traffic and protect mission-essential users.
white_cell_notes: Use as branch to C2 and ISR degradation.

title: Coordinated Deepfake Release
situation: A falsified video of a senior leader spreads online during coalition consultations.
decision_required: Determine attribution posture, public messaging, and alliance coordination.
white_cell_notes: Escalates to public protest pressure if delayed beyond one turn.

title: Bot Amplification Surge
situation: Automated accounts amplify a hostile narrative against force presence in the area.
decision_required: Choose whether to counter-message, ignore, or coordinate with civil authorities.
white_cell_notes: Follow with mainstream media pickup if left unanswered.

title: Leaked Planning Document Claim
situation: An anonymous channel publishes what appears to be a fragment of campaign planning guidance.
decision_required: Confirm authenticity, protect sources, and assess operational compromise.
white_cell_notes: Use as pretext for protests and diplomatic pressure.

title: Fuel Allocation Mismatch
situation: Distribution data shows conflicting fuel quantities for forward units.
decision_required: Verify data integrity and decide which movements to prioritise.
white_cell_notes: Follow with delayed arrival and maintenance backlog.

title: Rail Transfer Halt
situation: A host-nation rail operator suspends service because of a safety incident claim.

title: Medical Supply Shortfall
